---
name: New topic / content request
about: Suggest a new seminar, workshop, or topic that isn't covered yet
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
---

**What topic would you like to see covered?**
e.g. "A seminar on diffusion models" or "More depth on transformer attention math"

**Where would it fit?**
Check [`COURSES.md`](../../COURSES.md) first: does this extend an existing course/workshop, or
is it a new standalone seminar?

**Why this topic?**
What's missing, and who would it help (beginners, a specific audience, a specific course)?

**Are you willing to contribute it yourself?**
If yes, see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how new topics are structured.
